full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1361

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1361.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libdvbv5-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.i686.rpm
libdvbv5-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.x86_64.rpm
libv4l-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.i686.rpm
libv4l-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.x86_64.rpm
libv4l-devel-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.i686.rpm
libv4l-devel-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.x86_64.rpm
v4l-utils-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libdvbv5-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.aarch64.rpm
libv4l-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.aarch64.rpm
libv4l-devel-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.aarch64.rpm
v4l-utils-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/v4l-utils-1.20.0-5.0.1.el9_7_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.20.0-5.0.1_1]
- Rebuilt to correct changelog

[1.20.0-5_1]
- Rebuilt for CRB inclusion
  Resolves: RHEL-135533
